title: CIE Dataset Structural Metadata
description: Schema for dataset structural metadata passed between agents. Raw patient record content is never included. Conforms to permissions.yaml capability: dataset.proxy_metadata and dataset.read_validated.

dataset_id.description: Unique identifier for this dataset registration.

execution_id.description: Execution context this metadata belongs to.

metadata_type.description: proxy_metadata: column names, types, counts only (dataset.proxy_metadata). validated_structural: post-quality-gate confirmed structure (dataset.read_validated).

source_file_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the source file for reproducibility audit. Never contains file content.

row_count.description: Total number of rows in the dataset.

column_count.description: Total number of columns in the dataset.

columns.description: Structural metadata for each column. No row-level content permitted.

var_n_alias_map.description: Mapping of var_n alias keys to original column names. Populated only after Security Agent r_code.restore_variables permission is granted.

quality_gate_passed.description: Null until Data Quality Agent evaluation completes. True enables downstream agent access.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of metadata extraction.

var_n.description: Anonymized column alias (e.g. var_1, var_2). Original column name is never stored here.

missing_count.description: Absolute count of missing values in this column.

missing_rate_pct.description: Percentage of missing values. Used by Data Quality Agent thresholds.

clinical_range_violation.description: True if any value exceeds declared clinical plausibility range.

SummaryStats.description: Aggregated statistical profile only. No individual row values.

top_categories.description: For categorical columns: top category labels and counts only.
